engine_label: Selenium headless Chrome (requests first, then browser if thin/error)
markdown:
[Timeline](index.html)

## Timeline 22ND F1TENTH AUTONOMOUS GRAND Prix

##### Timeline is subject to change. Please follow announcements in our slack channel for the latest updates.

DATE | IN-PERSON COMPETITION  
---|---  
August 28th |  Registration Opens  
October 22nd, 2:00PM - 3:00PM ET | [F1tenth Orientation 1 ( Competition Rules overview )](https://upenn.zoom.us/j/97846939432?pwd=DL0CnZyuKgVOYtSkX0dOlaDofV50Gd.1)  
[Slide](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1iHjzz5GMxUab5_8fyOn7EN2QVqvQTK_ukDevzE8uzEQ/edit?usp=sharing) [Video](https://drive.google.com/file/d/14VQsveXd5WL5oBqDwS_585yY0fr8Jpen/view?usp=drive_link)  
November 9th | Registration Closes, Video Demonstration Due  
**~~November 11th~~  
** November 18th - 10AM ET | [F1tenth Orientation 2 ( Track set up, Track overview for in-person competition, Teams Training )](https://upenn.zoom.us/j/99209769219?pwd=Qj2tBuOiIl3GdoAn4qb2H3lWBGcnnz.1)  
[Slide](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1Oj3q6oLuLeIQ0PUSu1ceEv2eX7iVvW0hn6CKWzVAwQs/edit?usp=sharing) [Video](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-Rjy8rSARPeSB213DdpMI6X_kQGLUtlI/view?usp=drive_link)  
December 15th | Track Setup (Track closed and testing not permitted)  
December 16th | Teams on-site registration and regulated training sessions  
December 17th | Open Training  
December 18th | Time Trials  
December 19th | Head-to-Head Tournament & Award Ceremony  
  
For a detailed timeline of the virtual competition, please refer to the [virtual competition website](https://autodrive-ecosystem.github.io/competitions/f1tenth-sim-racing-cdc-2024/#timeline).
